'''yasaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:tablemount|tablemount]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-s-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tablemount|tablemount]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| yasaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæsæyæth|yæsæyæth]] || [[word:yæsæyæj|yæsæyæj]] || [[word:yæsæyæsh|yæsæyæsh]] || [[word:yæsæyæ|yæsæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yasasayath|yasasayath]] || [[word:yasasayaj|yasasayaj]] || [[word:yasasayash|yasasayash]] || [[word:yasasaya|yasasaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yasayath|yasayath]] || [[word:yasayaj|yasayaj]] || [[word:yasayash|yasayash]] || [[word:yasaya|yasaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yasafyath|yasafyath]] || [[word:yasafyaj|yasafyaj]] || [[word:yasafyash|yasafyash]] || [[word:yasafyaf|yasafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yasayatha|yasayatha]] || [[word:yasayaja|yasayaja]] || [[word:yasayasha|yasayasha]] || [[word:yasayaka|yasayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yasayath|yasayath]] || [[word:yasayaj|yasayaj]] || [[word:yasayash|yasayash]] || [[word:yasaya|yasaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yasayathal|yasayathal]] || [[word:yasayajal|yasayajal]] || [[word:yasayashal|yasayashal]] || [[word:yasayakal|yasayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yasayathatha|yasayathatha]] || [[word:yasayajaja|yasayajaja]] || [[word:yasayashasha|yasayashasha]] || [[word:yasayaka|yasayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yasayathan|yasayathan]] || [[word:yasayajan|yasayajan]] || [[word:yasayashan|yasayashan]] || [[word:yasayakan|yasayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yasayathaoro|yasayathaoro]] || [[word:yasayajaoro|yasayajaoro]] || [[word:yasayashaoro|yasayashaoro]] || [[word:yasayakaoro|yasayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
